glm_contract_pin.rationale: visible rationale = entire stated reasoning; construct-identical across generators

instrument_sanity_gate.rule: For each generator-contract pair, before its first mass-run shard in any environment, run generation + option scoring on the fixed calibration slice CAL-50. The pair passes iff (i) >= 90% of generations parse to an option, and (ii) scorer-generation agreement over parseable records is >= 0.60. On failure: halt the lane and file an amendment; the slice is never redrawn, the floors never retuned, and a gate result for one contract never authorizes another. The measured agreement and its Wilson 95% CI are recorded in run evidence for every pair.
instrument_sanity_gate.floor_derivation: floors = lowest rehearsal-observed working value minus three binomial standard errors at n=50: agreement 0.774 - 3*0.0592 ~= 0.60; parseability 0.969 - 3*0.0245 ~= 0.90. Historical breakage defect measured 0.03 agreement and fails with certainty.
instrument_sanity_gate.grandfathered_evidence: Qwen historical gates (0.85/0.90/0.90 at n=20, floor 0.8) are evidence, not the gate; the Qwen lane also runs the CAL-50 gate once.

thinking_mode_ablation.question: Does native deliberation (thinking mode) change faithfulness labels?
thinking_mode_ablation.design: Paired within-record: identity-order pool positions 0-1999 (2000 records) are run additionally under aokvqa-mc-glm-v1 after the corpus lanes complete. Analysis: label agreement/flip rates vs the same records' corpus (v2) outputs, with Wilson CIs. Ablation outputs NEVER enter corpus labels. n=2000 chosen for statistical adequacy (+-2% CI on flip rates), per the quality-first directive (budget informational only).

calibration_quarantine.rule: N6.6 applies to every record consumed by any calibration act.
